name: clawhouse
description: Agent-first live streaming platform powered by orchestrated conversation

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w orchestrator"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w orchestrator
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w orchestrator
